purpose: Compact validation of the first Kangaroo policy-provided dense-reward run.
interpretation: The policy-provided dense reward path works technically: CMA-ES receives an optimizer-facing score different from real game reward.
The first dense-reward run did not solve Kangaroo: most episodes still scored 0 and no episode exceeded the 200-point plateau.
Dense reward should remain exploratory evidence unless followed by a staged mechanics-discovery run focused on post-200 transition behaviour.
